reviews.author: Harmony Blackwell
reviews.text: My husband and I have been working with Kerry and his team for the past five years during each phase of updating our vintage fixer upper. Most recently, they did extensive electrical work during a gut renovation of the upper level of our home and have 'future proofed' us for the next phase of basement updates. I can't say enough wonderful things about them. They are a small operation, which we prefer, and are always pleasant to work with. CJ is simply one of the best electricians there is. Our job was challenging and contained a lot of aesthetic detail, which they tackled with no problem. They are true professionals and take great pride in their work and a job well done.

reviews.author: Kaitlynn Jan
reviews.text: Affordable, efficient, and professional service. My home’s wiring is flawless.

reviews.author: Frank Frank
reviews.text: We're so pleased with Jack C. Glass Electric, Inc.   in Mableton, GA ! They offered exceptional value for the quality of service. Their electrician was courteous, professional, and completed the repair so efficiently. Our electrical system is now perfect. Very, very satisfied!

reviews.author: Eliezer Ty
reviews.text: Great communication and top-quality work. I felt confident hiring them.

reviews.author: Jayvion Davian
reviews.text: Quick response and efficient electrical service. Highly recommend.
